summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by the expanded FaultMatrixPanel component with FaultBar sub-component displaying labelled bars for Party A/B, contributing factors, rationale, and active scenario highlighting. REQ-2 is addressed by faultMatrix.ts containing all seven scenario types (rear-end, red-light, lane-change, turning, junction, roundabout, reversing) with required fields. REQ-3 is addressed by FaultReferenceDisplay with FaultPercentageBar components showing labelled bars alongside legal references. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
